subcodes.first_line: The world hath been honored by the advent of the Lord of Eternity, and the Promised One hath manifested His evident Beauty from behind the veil of the unseen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد تشرف العالم بقدوم مالک القدم و تجلی الموعود بجماله المشهود علی الغیب و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
